title: Pattern Match Count (Overlapping)
description: Count the number of (possibly overlapping) occurrences of pattern P inside text T.

solutions.python:
import sys

t = sys.stdin.readline().rstrip('\n')
p = sys.stdin.readline().rstrip('\n')

n = len(t)
m = len(p)
count = 0

for i in range(n - m + 1):
    if t[i:i+m] == p:
        count += 1

print(count)

starter_code.python:
import sys
t = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
p = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
cnt = 0
for i in range(len(t)-len(p)):   
    if t[i:i+len(p)] != p:       
        cnt += 1
print(cnt)
